Class ChecklistPageController

java.lang.Object
controller.ChecklistPageController
All Implemented Interfaces:
IChecklistPageListener, ICollectionPageListener, IDataPanelListener<Task>
public class ChecklistPageController extends Object implements IChecklistPageListener
Controller for the checklist page in the ToDo Master application by implementing the IChecklistPageListener interface.

It responds to user requests like renaming the checklist, creating and editing tasks, sorting tasks, deleting lists and tasks, and switching between views.

It delegates the navigation between pages to the AppController and relies on dialog classes to gather user input or confirmation before modifying data.

    Displays a confirmation dialog to clear all tasks in the checklist.

    onDisplayModeToggled()
    Toggles the checklist's display mode between simple flowing text view and card panel view.
    void

    Displays a dialog to edit the specified task's details.
    void

    Toggles the completion status of the selected task and refreshes the checklist page.

    Displays a dialog to rename the checklist title.

  • Constructor Details

    • ChecklistPageController

      public ChecklistPageController(IAppNavigator appController, IUserDialogService dialogService)
      Constructs a new ChecklistPageController.
      Parameters:
      appController - the main application controller responsible for navigation; must not be null
      dialogService - the dialog service used for user interactions; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if appController or dialogService is null

  • Method Details

    • onRenameTitleRequested

      public void onRenameTitleRequested()
      Displays a dialog to rename the checklist title. Updates the checklist's title if the dialog is confirmed.
      Specified by:
      onRenameTitleRequested in interface ICollectionPageListener

    • onAddNewItemRequested

      public void onAddNewItemRequested()
      Displays a dialog to create a new task. Adds the task to the checklist if the dialog is confirmed.
      Specified by:
      onAddNewItemRequested in interface ICollectionPageListener

    • onClearRequested

      public void onClearRequested()
      Displays a confirmation dialog to clear all tasks in the checklist. Clears the list if the dialog is confirmed.
      Specified by:
      onClearRequested in interface ICollectionPageListener

    • onDeleteListRequested

      public void onDeleteListRequested(Checklist listToDelete)
      Displays a confirmation dialog to delete the given checklist. Removes the list from the workspace and returns to the workspace page if confirmed.
      Specified by:
      onDeleteListRequested in interface IChecklistPageListener
      Parameters:
      listToDelete - the checklist to delete

    • onSortModeChosen

      public void onSortModeChosen(TaskSorter.Mode sortMode)
      Sets the sort mode for the checklist's tasks.
      Specified by:
      onSortModeChosen in interface IChecklistPageListener
      Parameters:
      sortMode - the mode to use for sorting

    • onDisplayModeToggled

      public void onDisplayModeToggled()
      Toggles the checklist's display mode between simple flowing text view and card panel view.
      Specified by:
      onDisplayModeToggled in interface IChecklistPageListener

    • onBackButtonPressed

      public void onBackButtonPressed()
      Navigates back to the workspace page.
      Specified by:
      onBackButtonPressed in interface IChecklistPageListener

    • onEditItemRequested

      public void onEditItemRequested(Task itemToEdit)
      Displays a dialog to edit the specified task's details. Updates the task's title, details, priority, and deadline if the dialog is confirmed.
      Specified by:
      onEditItemRequested in interface IDataPanelListener<Task>
      Parameters:
      itemToEdit - the task to edit

    • onDeleteItemRequested

      public void onDeleteItemRequested(Task taskToDelete)
      Displays a confirmation dialog to delete a specific task. Removes the task if the dialog is confirmed.
      Specified by:
      onDeleteItemRequested in interface IDataPanelListener<Task>
      Parameters:
      taskToDelete - the task to delete

    • onItemSelected

      public void onItemSelected(Task selectedTask)
      Toggles the completion status of the selected task and refreshes the checklist page.
      Specified by:
      onItemSelected in interface IDataPanelListener<Task>
      Parameters:
      selectedTask - the task that was selected
